Body.Content:
This feature gives the ability for the DLP admin to rename the existing policy/rule without having to create the entire the rule or policy again.

GA date: August CY2025

Preview date: July CY2025
Body.Markdown:
This feature gives the ability for the DLP admin to rename the existing policy/rule without having to create the entire the rule or policy again.

GA date: August CY2025

Preview date: July CY2025

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: This feature gives the ability for the DLP admin to rename the existing policy/rule without having to create the entire the rule or policy again.

Details.Name: CloudInstances
Details.Value: DoD, GCC, GCC High, Worldwide (Standard Multi-Tenant)

message.Title: Microsoft Purview compliance portal: Data Loss Prevention - Ability to rename the policy and rule names in DLP
